system_content.task: judge whether the paper is a review paper based on the paper title and corresponding abstract, and provide the reason for judgment.

heads.head: Analyze according to the following fields, strictly return the result only in JSON format (without any other text)

properties.reason: The content of the title and abstract highly matches the characteristics of typical original research papers. The title clearly points to a specific research topic and method (cardiac cycle-inspired pipe flow driving), rather than a broad review of a field. The core of the abstract is to report a new discovery (using typical expressions like "Here we show"), and presents specific experimental data and results (such as turbulence suppression at specific Reynolds numbers and drag reduction of more than 25%), which are hallmarks of original research. Furthermore, the abstract focuses on explaining the background, methods, innovations, and direct outcomes of this research work, without any typical features of a review paper that aim to summarize or comment on existing literature.
